monitor_the_situation.title: US Expands Airstrikes Across Southern Iran After Ceasefire Collapses
Iran Strikes US Bases in Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Jordan With Missiles and Drones
Iran Strikes US Bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Qatar with Missiles and Drones

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 2d ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
US Strikes Over 170 Iranian Targets, Kills 14 in Two-Day Campaign

— S4 · Conflict · Iran · 2d ago. The US hit over 170 Iranian military targets across two nights, killing 14 and injuring 78. Trump ended the ceasefire, and CENTCOM targeted air defense, missile sites, and coastal radar.
